Uses of Class
org.apache.paimon.predicate.NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction

  • Packages that use NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction 
    Package Description
    org.apache.paimon.predicate  

    • Uses of NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction in org.apache.paimon.predicate

      Subclasses of NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction in org.apache.paimon.predicate 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  Equal
      A NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction to eval equal.
      class  GreaterOrEqual
      A NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction to eval greater or equal.
      class  GreaterThan
      A LeafFunction to eval greater.
      class  LessOrEqual
      A NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction to eval less or equal.
      class  LessThan
      A NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction to eval less or equal.
      class  NotEqual
      A NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction to eval not equal.
      class  StartsWith
      A NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction to evaluate filter like 'abc%' or filter like 'abc_'.
      Methods in org.apache.paimon.predicate with parameters of type NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Predicate PredicateBuilder.leaf(NullFalseLeafBinaryFunction function, int idx, Object literal)
